---
title: "Brevet 200 Vuelta del Campo"
date: "2025-05-10"
categories: 
  - ciclismo
---

:::: {.tabla_ciclismo}
| Variable                | Valor     |
|------------------------:|-----------|
|**Distancia total:**     | 201.87 km |
|**Ascenso acumulado**    | 1,199 m   |
|**Velocidad promedio:**  | 24.0 km/h |
|**Tiempo en movimiento** |	8:25:24  |
|**Tiempo total**         | 10:47:33  |
::::

<div class="strava-embed-placeholder" data-embed-type="activity" data-embed-id="14440156472" data-style="standard"></div><script src="https://strava-embeds.com/embed.js"></script>
